fx_verdict: Foreign currency reduced consolidated net operating revenues by 2%, with Latin America absorbing a 12% unfavorable impact and Asia Pacific 3%. Reported growth of 2% understates the underlying business: stripping currency and divestitures, organic growth was approximately 5%.
ma_verdict: Acquisitions and divestitures reduced revenue by 1% consolidated and 7% in Bottling Investments, reflecting refranchising of bottling operations in the Philippines, Bangladesh and parts of India. This is deliberate structural change, not lost business.
one_time_verdict: Remeasurement of the fairlife contingent consideration liability affected operating income comparability.
gap_explanation: Segment operating income moves are attributed by management to concentrate volume, pricing initiatives, commodity costs and currency rather than to non-recurring charges.
